subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify the subject of the entertainment passage

sections.heading: Passage Focus
sections.content: The passage is about Onyeka Onwenu and presents her as a renowned Nigerian artiste, broadcaster, singer, actress, and politician whose qualities win over audiences.

sections.heading: Learning Tasks
sections.content: Identify the subject of the entertainment passage. Read for enjoyment and understanding. Answer questions from the passage.
